target.title: fix(sessions): honor configured store for outbound transcript mirrors
target.body:
Closes #95781

## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where users who configure `session.store` away from the default per-agent store can have outbound transcript mirrors skip or misplace mirrored assistant replies. The affected outbound mirror paths passed runtime config into transcript append, but the append fallback still resolved the default session store when no explicit `storePath` was supplied.

## Why This Change Was Made

Transcript append now preserves explicit `storePath` priority, then resolves fallback stores through `config.session.store`. For `{agentId}` store templates, it uses the explicit `agentId` when present and otherwise derives the agent from the canonical `agent:<id>:...` session key, matching existing session-store workflow behavior.

The change stays inside the session transcript append boundary; outbound mirror callers already pass config and do not need to gain store-path plumbing.

## User Impact

Outbound mirrored replies now land in the intended configured session transcript store, including multi-agent stores that use `{agentId}` templates. Channel delivery behavior is unchanged.

## Evidence

- Verified the issue still exists on current `upstream/main`: transcript append still falls back to `resolveDefaultSessionStorePath(params.agentId)`, while outbound mirror callers pass `config` but no `storePath`.
- No duplicate issue/PR found via live GitHub searches for `outbound transcript store`, `session.store transcript mirror`, `configured store transcript`, and `session store mirror`.
- `pnpm test src/config/sessions/transcript.test.ts src/config/sessions/transcript-append-redact.test.ts -- --reporter=dot` -> 63 passed.
- `pnpm test src/infra/outbound/outbound-session.test.ts src/infra/outbound/outbound-send-service.test.ts src/infra/outbound/deliver.test.ts -- --reporter=dot` -> 152 passed.
- `pnpm test src/gateway/server-methods/send.test.ts -- --reporter=dot -t "mirror|mirrors|mirroring"` -> 118 passed.
- `pnpm test src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/delivery-dispatch.double-announce.test.ts -- --reporter=dot` -> 215 + 82 passed.
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/config/sessions/transcript.ts src/config/sessions/transcript.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts`
- `git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD`
- `node scripts/changed-lanes.mjs --base upstream/main --json` -> `core` and `coreTests` only.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --engine codex` -> clean; no accepted/actionable findings.
target.author: youngting520
